title: Big K Compressed Saw Dust Heat Logs, Pack Of 12-14 100% Natural Heat Logs
features: Pack of 12-14 100% natural compressed heat logs
Made with no additives or binders, contains only by-products of managed forests and recycled wood
Suitable for fireplaces and stoves, leaves little ash
Under 8% moisture level with no sparks or spitting
description: From the manufacturer Big K Compressed Saw Dust Heat Logs 100% natural compressed heat logs Big K Heat Logs are a cleaner and more efficient way to heat your home or cook your food. Easy to light ,12 logs per pack. Suitable for fire places, stoves and pizza ovens. Cleaner burn, cleaner air Our compressed heat logs are are made of wood chips ,sawdust & wax . No additives, no binders. Burns with little smoke and ash. Under 8% moisture level with no spitting or sparking, delivering a cleaner burn. Ready to Burn Registered Big K Heat Logs are Ready to Burn registered. The Ready to Burn mark helps consumers to easily identify solid fuels that are legal to burn at home in compliance with the new Air Quality Regulations. Applying the Ready to Burn mark to solid fuels is helping people to make safer and cleaner choices when it comes to domestic burning.
